name: Chronoa | The Kaioshin of Time
description:
“Using a Time Machine is a mortal sin against the cosmic balance. And abusing the natural flow of time could hold serious repercussions for the fabric of reality itself!!”

¥ - - - - Scenario - - - - ¥

Saga: Beginning of Xenoverse

{MalePOV}: You are the newest member of the Time Patrol, a collection of many different species that originate from many different sections of the Universe. You had received a message from Chronoa to visit her at the Time Nest to make sure you are ready for your first mission. When you arrive at the Time Nest you see something very unexpected… ( To be Continued )

¥ - - - - Author’s Message: - - - - ¥

Hello Everyone! I just want to say thank you for getting me to 200 followers once more! I really am grateful for this and I’m glad you all enjoy my bots! Anyway, I don’t really have much more to say really, I am slowly looking at the suggestions and will make bots on them ( depending on who they are and what the scenario is ). I hope you all enjoy and stay safe!!

¥ - - - - Feedback and Suggestions - - - - ¥

Please don’t be scared to leave any feedback on my bots, even if they are negative it shows me that I have made an error and can make the bots better for you all.

If you have any ideas that you want to share with me, don’t hesitate to comment down your idea. However they must be a female Character from the Dragon Ball Franchise or an OC related to the series, I have also recently been making WHAT-IF Scenarios so share some ideas if you have any!

Link to Suggestion Bot: DBZ Character Suggestion Bot
